source_milestone: R15 Knowledge Base, Agent Identity, Memory, and RACI Foundations
rejection_basis: R15 artifacts are contracts, validators, model artifacts, validation manifests, proof-review packages, and one bounded dry-run artifact.

No committed evidence implements runtime agents, runtime memory loading, retrieval, board routing, workflow execution, integrations, product runtime, R16 opening, main merge, or external audit acceptance.
Generated Markdown and reports are operator artifacts unless backed by committed machine evidence.
